4178.reason: [This loop condition can cause NullPointerException when NextToken(i) returns null, and the logic for detecting LVal is flawed as it doesn't properly handle complex expressions with brackets or nested structures]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  [The loop condition uses NextToken(i) which may return null if i exceeds token list size, causing NullPointerException. Also, the loop may never terminate if there is no ';' token ahead, leading to infinite loop or index out of bounds.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This loop condition can cause NullPointerException when NextToken(i) returns null, and the logic for detecting LVal is flawed as it doesn't properly handle complex expressions with brackets or nested structures]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This loop condition assumes a semicolon will always be found, which may cause NullPointerException if the token stream ends unexpectedly or if there's a syntax error. Also, it doesn't properly handle nested structures like function calls or complex expressions that might contain '=' not as assignment.]
